name: Nakamichi Leasing Co., Ltd.
summary: Nakamichi Leasing Co., Ltd. provides leasing services in Japan. It offers finance lease, deferred payment, and car lease products; finance and medical loans; and life and non-life insurance products. The company also provides space system and energy services. Nakamichi Leasing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
